name: Lore Deepening
summary: Build canon and player-safe codex entries
purpose: Expand the world bible (canon) and derive player-safe glossary entries (codex). Build the lore that creative agents need, then surface what players can safely see.
description: Lore Deepening builds depth: the causes behind events, the secrets factions hide, the rules of the metaphysics. Lore Weaver creates Canon Packs—portable containers of world truth. Codex Curator then distills player-safe entries from that truth. Style Lead ensures codex entries maintain diegetic voice. Gatekeeper validates that no spoilers leak into the codex.

triggers.condition: Story Spark identifies canon gaps or feasibility concerns
Researcher delivers findings that need integration into world bible
New book or major expansion requires shared lore foundation
Hooks accepted that require new world truth

optional_artifacts.description: Research findings to integrate into canon
Player-safe glossary entries derived from canon
Hooks for ambiguities discovered during lore work

canon_expansion.name: Canon Expansion
canon_expansion.purpose: Build or extend the world bible with causes, timelines, secrets, and metaphysical rules

assess_scope.action: Review inputs to determine what canon needs building: new themes, timeline gaps, faction motivations, metaphysical rules.
assess_scope.guidance: Identify what creative agents will need to reference. Group related lore into thematic packs. Check for contradictions with existing canon.

outputs.name: scope_assessment
outputs.description: What canon packs to create/update and why

build_canon.action: Create or update canon packs with world truth. Document causes, timelines, and relationships.
build_canon.guidance: Every fact needs a cause. Every event needs a timeline position. Mark open questions as such—don't paper over gaps with vague language.

consistency_check.action: Verify new canon doesn't contradict established world truth.
consistency_check.guidance: Cross-reference timelines, faction relationships, and metaphysical constraints. Raise hooks for unresolvable contradictions.

outputs.name: consistency_notes
outputs.description: Notes on canon consistency, any conflicts found

completion_criteria: All requested lore topics have canon coverage
Canon packs have cause chains and timeline anchors
No unaddressed contradictions with existing canon

codex_derivation.name: Codex Derivation
codex_derivation.purpose: Transform canon into player-safe glossary entries with diegetic voice

identify_codex_needs.action: Determine which canon elements need player-facing codex entries.
identify_codex_needs.guidance: Not everything in canon needs a codex entry. Focus on terms players will encounter, places they'll visit, entities they'll meet. Skip secrets they shouldn't know.

outputs.name: codex_plan
outputs.description: List of entries to create with spoiler boundaries

write_entries.action: Create codex entries in diegetic voice, stripping all spoilers.
write_entries.guidance: Write as an in-world scholar would. Use accessible language. Never reveal secrets, motivations, or outcomes that would spoil play. When in doubt, leave it out.

completion_criteria: All planned terms have codex entries
No obvious spoilers in entry text

style_safety_gate.name: Style & Safety Gate
style_safety_gate.purpose: Validate codex entries for voice consistency and spoiler leaks

style_review.action: Review codex entries for diegetic voice, accessible language, and style consistency.
style_review.guidance: Entries should feel written by the same in-world author. Flag any meta-language, game-mechanical references, or inconsistent register.

spoiler_check.action: Validate that no codex entry reveals spoiler-level information.
spoiler_check.guidance: Compare each entry against its canon source. Flag any information that would reveal secrets, outcomes, or hidden motivations. This is a safety gate—be conservative.

completion_criteria: All codex entries pass style review

on_success.message: Canon packs and codex entries ready. Canon available to creative agents, codex ready for export.

runtime_actions.condition: Gatekeeper approved canon packs and codex entries
runtime_actions.description: Commit canon packs and codex entries to cold store

parallel.description: Triage hooks generated during lore work

conditional.condition: Canon gaps were blocking topology design
conditional.description: Resume structure work now that canon is available

conditional.condition: Canon gaps were blocking prose writing
conditional.description: Resume prose work now that canon is available

on_failure.message: Style or safety issues found. Return to Codex Derivation with feedback.
